creator: ohauer@gmx.de
text:
Ok, last try (hello is there anybody)

Since the last patches for this port are still unanswerd I give
it a new (last) try with a mostly rewritten Makefile.

I have neon28.6 now running since the first PR 2009-08-30 with subversion
and no issues found until now.

Please keep in mind version 28.6 fix at least CVE-2009-2473 and CVE-2009-2474

This version of the patch change the following:
 - default build with expat and ssl, so no changes to previous version (Feature safe)
 - add option to build the port with libxml2 instead of expat
 - add option to build port without ssl support
 - remove dead mirror server
 - extend CONFLICTS for new neon29.x version

//olli


--- patch_neon28.6.txt begins here ---
--- Makefile
+++ Makefile
@@ -6,34 +6,40 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	neon28
-PORTVERSION=	0.28.4
+PORTVERSION=	0.28.6
 CATEGORIES=	www
-MASTER_SITES=	http://www.webdav.org/neon/ \
-		http://keyserver.kjsl.com/~jharris/distfiles/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://www.webdav.org/neon/
 DISTNAME=	neon-${PORTVERSION}
 
 MAINTAINER=	lev@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	An HTTP and WebDAV client library for Unix systems
 
-LIB_DEPENDS=	expat.6:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/expat2
-
-CONFLICTS=	neon26-[0-9]*
+CONFLICTS=	neon2[6|9]-[0-9]*
 
 USE_AUTOTOOLS=	libtool:22
 USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
 
-.ifndef WITHOUT_OPENSSL
-USE_OPENSSL=	yes
-.endif
-
 USE_GNOME=	gnomehack gnometarget
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
-CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--with-ssl \
-		--enable-xml \
-		--enable-shared \
-		--with-expat \
+CONFIGURE_ARGS= --enable-shared \
 		--with-libs=${LOCALBASE}:${PREFIX}
 
+# expat is default unless WITH_XML is choosen
+.if !defined(WITHOUT_EXPAT) && !defined(WITH_XML)
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+= --with-expat
+LIB_DEPENDS+=	expat.6:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/expat2
+.endif
+
+.if defined(WITH_XML)
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--with-libxml2
+LIB_DEPENDS+=   xml2.5:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/libxml2
+.endif
+
+.ifndef WITHOUT_OPENSSL
+USE_OPENSSL=	yes
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--with-ssl
+.endif
+
 .if defined(WITHOUT_NLS)
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--disable-nls
 PLIST_SUB+=	NLS="@comment "
@@ -119,6 +125,12 @@
 
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
+pre-everything::
+.if defined(WITH_EXPAT) && defined(WITH_XML)
+	@${ECHO_CMD} "please choose between expat and libxml2 not both"
+	@${FALSE}
+.endif
+
 post-install:
 	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/doc/man/*.1 ${MANPREFIX}/man/man1
 	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/doc/man/*.3 ${MANPREFIX}/man/man3
--- distinfo
+++ distinfo
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (neon-0.28.4.tar.gz) = 6c3b94362af743d046e198e9fcbe4a85
-SHA256 (neon-0.28.4.tar.gz) = be151943df34e5884b2c7f4b5f4ebe83b8e74e665d90474aca06006e3b9530bd
-SIZE (neon-0.28.4.tar.gz) = 775886
+MD5 (neon-0.28.6.tar.gz) = 252578ed555552b71d15909641484951
+SHA256 (neon-0.28.6.tar.gz) = 06ee8b1aa37a14a956a1158bf6b5a8c3388976d61c1dc3773a3ffe18ac8ecc0e
+SIZE (neon-0.28.6.tar.gz) = 789193
--- patch_neon28.6.txt ends here ---
